strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing product ownership and Kubernetes deployment experience
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development) with teaching and conference talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products beyond recent MCP tooling exposure
No evidence of director-level IC influence, executive advisory work, or strategic customer engagement
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK, no GCP/Azure architecture leadership)

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI products
Depth and breadth of engineering experience
No prior strategic advisory or director-level IC scope

response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with deep craftsmanship roots, open-source founding experience, and recent exposure to agentic/MCP tooling. However, the role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI platforms, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption — none of which are clearly demonstrated. The profile reads as a great staff engineer, not a Principal AI strategist.
